about.title: About Me
about.p1: Hi, I’m Dmytro — a Fullstack Developer passionate about building modern, efficient web apps. I turn complex problems into clean, user-friendly solutions and enjoy exploring new technologies.
about.p2: On the frontend, I craft responsive, accessible interfaces with React, Redux, TypeScript, HTML, and CSS. On the backend, I build robust APIs with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, handling authentication and data securely.
about.p3: As a team lead, I coordinated development across multiple projects, guided teammates, and ensured smooth collaboration, delivering high-quality features on time and boosting overall team productivity.
about.p4: I continuously challenge myself with new technologies and real-world projects, always aiming to create impact and growth — both in the product and the team.

hero.name: Dmytro Kovbasiuk
hero.info: I build modern responsive web applications

projects.title: Projects
projects.aqua: Team project. Aqua Track is a hydration tracking web application that helps users monitor daily water intake and build healthy habits. As the Front-End Team Lead, I coordinated UI development using React, managed application state with Redux, and supported the team during development. The backend uses Node.js and MongoDB.
projects.finance: Financial Analyst is a personal full-stack project for tracking personal income and expenses. Users can add transactions, analyze finances monthly and yearly, and visualize financial data with charts. The application includes secure authentication and is currently in active development.
projects.istore: IStore is a full-stack e-commerce application where users can browse products, view details, add items to the cart, and complete purchases. It includes authentication with role-based access (admin, user, demo). Demo account available for testing: Email: demo.admin@gmail.com | Password: 111111. Built with Next.js, Redux Toolkit, Node.js, and MongoDB.
projects.movie: A React application that integrates a public movie API to display dynamic movie data. The project demonstrates API integration, state management, and responsive interface development using modern React practices.
projects.phonebook: A full-stack contact management application where users can register and manage personal contacts. Features include adding, editing, deleting, sorting, and filtering contacts. Built with React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB with multilingual support.
projects.portfolio: Team portfolio project with a responsive layout. As Team Lead, I managed the GitHub repository, reviewed pull requests, and coordinated the development process. I also implemented the 'Work Together' section.
projects.sparkart: A modern landing page designed to present a creative brand and its services. The project focuses on clean UI, responsive design, and an engaging layout aimed at attracting potential clients.
projects.truck: A React-based application that allows users to search and filter data from an external API. The project demonstrates dynamic content rendering, API integration, and interactive UI development.
projects.seo: A modern landing page for a digital SEO and marketing agency built with Next.js. The project focuses on presenting services such as SEO optimization, analytics, and digital marketing strategies. Responsive design is currently in progress.
projects.webTech: A modern responsive landing page for a digital agency built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS using a mobile-first approach. The project focuses on clean UI, responsive design, and performance optimization.

approach.title: My Approach
approach.subtitle: A clear, user-centered process ensures scalable and maintainable results.
approach.s1: Start by understanding business goals, users, and project needs to build a solid foundation.
approach.s2: Plan the architecture and choose technologies that fit the project perfectly.
approach.s3: Craft responsive, clean, and maintainable interfaces with attention to detail.
approach.s4: Test rigorously, optimize, and ensure cross-device compatibility.
approach.s5: Deploy efficiently and provide long-term support to keep projects scalable and reliable.
